long_description:
NRE were alerted of link flaps between bbr01.tg01.lon01 ae17 <-> PP PP. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19887
short_description: bbr01.tg01.lon01 ae17, xe-1/0/3, xe-10/0/3 | Private Peering Link Flap
close_notes: Link is stable from more than 2 days
